headline: BofA Maintains a Neutral Rating on Allegion plc (ALLE)
summary: Allegion plc (NYSE:ALLE) is one of the Best Industrial Stocks. On April 29, 2026, BofA lowered the price target for Allegion plc (NYSE:ALLE) to $150 from $157. It retained a Neutral rating on the shares. The firm noted less than expected first-quarter performance and lower sector multiples. On April 28, the firm announced its results for […]

headline: Fitch Affirms Allegion's IDR at 'BBB'; Outlook Stable
summary: Fitch Ratings has affirmed Allegion plc's and Allegion US Holding Company Inc.'s Long-Term Issuer Default Ratings at 'BBB'.The Rating Outlook is Stable. Fitch has also affirmed the senior unsecured...
